commands.review_summary:
The branch updates Windows QMD shim/package fallback resolution, adds guarded OpenAI-compatible image URL downloads and response parsing, expands SDK/docs/tests around those surfaces, and includes broad formatting plus root dependency metadata changes.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and PR proof: current main resolves QMD through the existing Windows shim/package fallback paths and parses OpenAI-compatible image assets without the new URL-backed async downloader path; the branch adds focused tests and Crabbox/local proof for those cases. I did not rerun tests in this read-only review.
